title: iris lactea subsp. chinensis
intro: Iris lactea subsp. chinensis, also known as the Chinese iris, is a subspecies of the iris lactea plant, a flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the Iris lactea subsp. chinensis is used in herbal medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Iris lactea subsp. chinensis is often used in decoctions, infusions, and dried form, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
